summary: Verified data isolation feature for non-admin users. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Admin sees 8 orders via API, cashier sees 0 orders. Dashboard stats: Admin sees 4 orders/20K sales, cashier sees 0 orders/0 sales. Frontend: Admin dashboard shows stats and recent orders, cashier dashboard shows limited quick actions only. Orders page: Admin sees 6 orders, cashier sees 0 orders with 'لا توجد طلبات' message.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: get_orders endpoint (line ~4928) correctly adds cashier_id filter for non-admin users
VERIFIED: get_orders defaults to today's orders for non-admin users when no date filter specified
VERIFIED: get_dashboard_stats (line ~14593) adds cashier_id to base_query for non-admin users
VERIFIED: is_manager check correctly identifies super_admin, admin, and manager roles
VERIFIED: build_branch_query handles tenant/branch isolation properly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test cashier user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data isolation feature verified working. Non-admin users (cashier role) only see their own orders via cashier_id filter. Test cashier has not created any orders so sees 0 orders/stats. Admin sees all orders (8 via API, 6 on orders page for today). Dashboard for cashier shows limited quick actions only (no stats section, no recent orders section). The cashier dashboard appears to have hide_recent_orders permission enabled from previous iteration.
